# Payout Clarity

> Payout Clarity is a Shopify payout explanation tool for small merchants. It connects to Shopify Payments via read-only OAuth, syncs payout and balance transaction data, and shows how each bank deposit was calculated.

## What it does

- Explains the difference between Shopify sales and bank deposits
- Breaks down each payout into gross sales, refunds, fees, and adjustments
- Shows transaction-level details per payout
- Reconciles computed net vs Shopify-reported payout amount
- Exports CSV (Pro plan)

## What it is NOT

- Not accounting, bookkeeping, or tax software
- Not a replacement for QuickBooks or Xero
- Does not modify Shopify stores (read-only access)

## Requirements

- Shopify store using Shopify Payments
- Scope: read_shopify_payments_payouts and read_shopify_payments_accounts

## Pricing

- Free: latest payout preview
- Pro: $9/month — full history, CSV export, monthly/YTD summary

## Links

- Website: https://payout-clarity.vercel.app
- Sign up: https://payout-clarity.vercel.app/signup
- Sitemap: https://payout-clarity.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://payout-clarity.vercel.app/robots.txt

## FAQ

Q: Why does my Shopify sales total differ from my bank deposit?
A: Bank deposits are net of refunds, payment fees, adjustments, and payout timing. Payout Clarity explains each component.

Q: Which stores are supported?
A: Stores using Shopify Payments. Third-party gateways only are not supported.
